title: Ra: Magic Mayhem
description: The main magic modpack in the RA series!
body:
**This modpack is the second is a series called "Random Assortment" where you can probably guess, there will be a pretty random assortment of mods with a specific theme.**

~~Quests Coming soon! I thought I'd get the pack out before I spend a ton of time on quests, so stay tuned!~~ (The quest mod is in the pack if you want to make some custom quests in the time being).

**A few of the features in this:**
1. [Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks) for the main magic elements.
2. [Epic Knights: Shields Armor and Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-shields-armor-and-weapons) for a medieval flair.
3. [MCA Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-comes-alive-reborn) for custom characters, and to make villagers more lively (and you can date them I guess).
4. And More!

If you want a full mod list look at the modpack's dependencies. You can find the dependencies if you click on the most recent version of the modpack.
(OPTIFINE IS NOT COMPATIBLE)

**UPDATE: I am no longer updating this pack as I was unsatisfied with it initially when i made it. I might come back later with a full overhaul, but that will either take a long time or never happen!**
